sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.admin_permissions (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), company_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, admin_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, can_reset_passwords BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, can_view_chat_history BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, can_manage_payroll BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, can_manage_settings BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, can_approve_leaves BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), UNIQUE(company_id, admin_id)); ALTER TABLE public.profiles ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS force_logout_at TIMESTAMPTZ; ALTER TABLE public.admin_permissions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Admins manage permissions" ON public.admin_permissions; CREATE POLICY "Admins manage permissions" ON public.admin_permissions FOR ALL TO authenticated USING (company_id = user_company(auth.uid()) AND has_role(auth.uid(), 'admin'::app_role)); DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Admins read own permissions" ON public.admin_permissions; CREATE POLICY "Admins read own permissions" ON public.admin_permissions FOR SELECT TO authenticated USING (admin_id = auth.uid());
